description: construction invoice with materials, labor, and miscellaneous charge line items plus summary totals

invoiceNumber.description: the invoice number or identifier printed on the invoice.

materials.description: material charge line items, each a quantity of a material or work item at a unit rate. exclude any total/summary row such as TOTAL MATERIALS.

description.description: the material or work description exactly as printed on the line.

quantity.description: the billed quantity of units for the line.

rate.description: the price per unit for the line.

total.description: the line total, equal to quantity times rate.

labor.description: labor charge line items, each a number of hours of a task at an hourly rate. exclude any total/summary row such as TOTAL LABOR.

description.description: the labor task description exactly as printed on the line.

hours.description: the number of hours worked for the line.

rate.description: the hourly rate for the line.

amount.description: the line amount, equal to hours times rate.

miscellaneousCharges.description: miscellaneous charge line items. exclude any total/summary row such as TOTAL MISCELLANEOUS.

description.description: the miscellaneous charge description exactly as printed.

totalMaterials.description: the printed sum of all material line totals.

totalLabor.description: the printed sum of all labor line amounts.

totalMiscellaneous.description: the printed sum of all miscellaneous charge amounts.

taxRate.description: the tax rate applied, expressed as a percentage number (e.g. 3.8 means 3.80%).
